name: dev-loop
description: Generic single-pass PRD + skillwiki dev cycle engine. v1.22.0: /goal compatible mode - ORCHESTRATION_CAPS for goal-context detection, GRILL goal_override:never suppresses interviews under /goal, RETRO emits continuation hints, /goal Integration documents grill-me -> /goal -> dev-loop. v1.21.0: investigate mode adds proactive work-item creation (`/dev-loop investigate`) from code/vault/transcript/deep-research findings with tiered output (`status: proposed`) and vault-required gating. v1.20.0: compact-counter visibility - proactive 0-count emit, tuned thresholds {0-1 silent emit, 2 note, 3 warn, 4+ block}, HUD bridge writes ~/.claude/dev-loop/last-doctor.json for ccstatusline consumers. v1.19.0: release_policy.trigger_globs consumer in PUSH step - opt-in auto-bump on shippable commits, skip on vault/doc-only cycles. v1.18.1: vault-local wiki-presync skill discovery - probe and invoke before vault push. v1.18.0: peer-aware vault push gate - SAVE/MERGE acquire skillwiki advisory lockfile. v1.17.1: doctor-worker skillwiki bridge + research-worker stale buckets + wiki-sync dependency. v1.17.0: vault auto-commit gate + AUDIT dirty-tree check. v1.16.0: auto-archive originating raw transcripts via `closes:` frontmatter. v1.15.0: pluggable multi-backend code review. MERGE CI gate uses ci-health-worker. Execution subagents hard-wired to sonnet. /setup-dev-loop scaffolds 14 config sections (A-N).
